COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 31, 2007 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CRANE CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF PRESENTED TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT BASED ON, AMONG OTHER THINGS, THE DECLARATIONS OF PLAINTIFF, AY AND DEPOSITION OF MCLEAN. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE ISSUE OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES. DENY AS TO OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. COURT OVERRULES THE FOLLOWING OBJECTIONS: COLE DECLARATION, MCCLEAN TESTIMONY, OBJECTION # 6 (CRANE CO.'S INTERROGATORIES) AND AY'S TESTIMONY. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CRANE CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: MEI LIN HOM, ESQUIRE (BRAYTON PURCELL, 415.898.1555) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MICHAEL R. HAVEN, ESQUIRE (K&L GATES, 650.798.6772) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF PRESENTED TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT BASED ON, AMONG OTHER THINGS, THE DECLARATIONS OF PLAINTIFF, AY AND DEPOSITION OF MCLEAN. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE ISSUE OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES. DENY AS TO OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. COURT OVERRULES THE FOLLOWING OBJECTIONS: COLE DECLARATION, MCCLEAN TESTIMONY, OBJECTION # 6 (CRANE CO.'S INTERROGATORIES) AND AY'S TESTIMONY. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
